groups.name: Quran User
groups.comment: Basic user - can read Quran content

groups.name: Quran Reader
groups.comment: Can read Quran, add bookmarks, manage personal reading history

groups.name: Quran Student
groups.comment: Can track memorization progress, set goals, receive reminders

groups.name: Quran Teacher
groups.comment: Can manage students, view their progress, provide feedback

groups.name: Quran Manager
groups.comment: Full access to Quran content management

groups.name: Quran Administrator
groups.comment: Full administrative access to all Quran features
